import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from fastapi import FastAPI

app = FastAPI()


class TextClassifier(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.embedding = nn.Embedding(10000, 256)
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(256, 128)
        self.fc = nn.Linear(128, 5)

    def forward(self, x):
        emb = self.embedding(x)
        _, (hidden, _) = self.lstm(emb)
        return self.fc(hidden.squeeze(0))


model = TextClassifier()
model.load_state_dict(torch.load("models/classifier.pt"))
model.eval()


@app.post("/classify")
async def classify_text(text: str):
    tokens = tokenize(text)
    tensor = torch.tensor([tokens])
    with torch.no_grad():
        output = model(tensor)
    return {"label": output.argmax().item()}


@app.post("/batch_classify")
async def batch_classify(texts: list[str]):
    tokens = [tokenize(text) for text in texts]
    tensor = torch.tensor(tokens)
    with torch.no_grad():
        output = model(tensor)
    return {"labels": output.argmax(dim=-1).tolist()}


def tokenize(text: str) -> list[int]:
    return [ord(c) % 10000 for c in text]
